missing_items.message: Duong ro thong voi khop gia (major criterion) — ket luan INFECTED ngay neu duong tinh
CRP huyet thanh (2 diem ICM) — marker viem he thong
Toc do mau lang ESR (1 diem ICM)
D-Dimer (2 diem ICM, ket hop CRP)
Bach cau dich khop (3 diem ICM) — marker quan trong nhat
Alpha-Defensin (3 diem ICM) — do dac hieu >96%
Leukocyte Esterase dich khop (3 diem ICM) — test nhanh tai cho
Giai phau benh mo quanh khop (3 diem ICM) — can sinh thiet mo trong phau thuat
Chua xac dinh ACUTE/CHRONIC — anh huong nguong ICM va chien luoc phau thuat
Chua danh gia on dinh implant — anh huong chon DAIR vs revision
Chua co creatinine/eGFR — can de chinh lieu Vancomycin va TMP-SMX
Chua co AST/ALT — can de danh gia an toan Rifampicin

data_completeness.completeness_score: 0/9 ICM minor criteria co du lieu
data_completeness.impact_note: Thieu 2 du lieu CRITICAL — ket qua chan doan va phac do co the khong chinh xac. Khuyen nghi bo sung truoc khi ap dung.

exchange arthroplasty
Introduction
The diagnosis of periprosthetic joint infection (PJI) is based 
on a multiple criteria system due to the lack of a single test 
with an accuracy of 100%. The consented criteria most 
broadly accepted today are the Musculoskeletal Infection
